description: Manage Zencoder/Zenflow projects, tasks, plans, workflows, and automations. Delegate complex coding problems to Zenflow's AI agents and track their progress.

auth.token_hint: JWT access token (three base64url segments separated by dots)
auth.instructions:
Zencoder uses an OAuth2 client_credentials exchange that IronClaw cannot perform itself.

1. Generate a personal access token at https://auth.zencoder.ai (Administration > Settings > Personal Tokens). Copy the Client ID and Client Secret immediately — shown only once.

2. In a separate terminal, run the bundled helper (comes with the repo):

   scripts/zencoder-auth.sh        # bash / zsh / WSL
   scripts\zencoder-auth.ps1       # PowerShell

   The helper prints a JWT token. Copy it.

3. Paste the JWT at the prompt below.

Alternative (no helper available):
   curl -s -X POST https://fe.zencoder.ai/oauth/token \
     -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
     -d '{"client_id":"<CLIENT_ID>","client_secret":"<CLIENT_SECRET>","grant_type":"client_credentials"}'
   Use single quotes around the JSON body to avoid smart-quote issues.
   Pipe through jq -r .access_token to extract the token.
